_patch_meta.description: VCB-11 VCREVISE — re-evaluation outcomes across 12 terms (11 NO-CHANGE + 1 REVISE-ONLY). The 11 NO-CHANGE terms (G0543, G3876, G1760, G3116, G3392, G3394, G3552, G3554, G3713, G3339, G3445) underwent full re-evaluation under v3_9 with all classifications confirmed; their advancement to vc_completed is the empty-ops segment (terms_covered carries them; no operations target them). The 1 REVISE-ONLY term (G1761) has its group 917-001 description broadened to embrace Acts 17:29's productive direction alongside the receptive direction. DF-002 (G3554 nosos) resolved by researcher Option A — wider theological lens retained as appropriate inner-being engagement. All re-evaluation self-checks balance; all orphan-group checks pass (no orphans across the 12 terms).

set.context_description: Term names the inner cognitive act of conception — the thoughts and devisings of the heart, both as the inner content that Christ perceives and God's word discerns, and as the inner faculty by which a person forms conceptions (including, where misdirected, conceptions of God)

operations.description: Revise context_description for group 917-001: Broadened to embrace Acts 17:29 (productive direction — inner faculty by which idolatrous conceptions are formed) alongside the receptive direction (Mat 9:4, Mat 12:25, Heb 4:12). Verse-level classifications all retained unchanged.

_patch_summary.nature: re-evaluation; mixed empty-ops + 1 group description revision
